mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM material_category
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM material_category WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_category (parent_id, name, code, sort, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{name}, #{code}, #{sort}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
